evals.description: Triggers on request to design an engagement survey
evals.prompt: Help me design an employee engagement survey for a 200-person engineering company
What is eNPS and how do I calculate and interpret it?

evals.description: Triggers on pulse check cadence question
evals.prompt: How often should we run employee pulse surveys and how long should they be?

evals.description: Can explain manager as top engagement lever
evals.prompt: What is the single most important factor in employee engagement?

evals.description: Can build an action plan from survey results
evals.prompt: Our latest engagement survey came back and psychological safety scored 58% favorable. What should we do?
Which employees are most at risk of leaving and how do I identify them?
Give me a set of stay interview questions to run with my top performers
We run an annual engagement survey every December. Is that enough?

evals.description: Can explain segmentation framework for survey results
evals.prompt: We got our engagement survey results back. How should we analyze and present them?

evals.description: Can explain the principle of acting on results
evals.prompt: Our employees say they don't trust engagement surveys and don't fill them in honestly anymore. Why might this happen?
What metrics should I track to measure whether our culture is healthy?

evals.description: Does not trigger for compensation benchmarking
evals.prompt: How do I benchmark our salaries against the market to make sure we're competitive?
